title: Confirmation bias — seeking information that confirms existing beliefs

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Three-mechanism flow: belief held → selective search (only confirming evidence gathered) → biased interpretation (ambiguous evidence read as confirming) → selective memory (confirming evidence better recalled) → belief reinforced — showing how all three mechanisms form a self-reinforcing loop.
artifact_plan.depth_signals: Topic covers one named bias with three sub-mechanisms plus experimental evidence and AI application layer — more than atomic but not requiring multi-session depth treatment.
